title: davidpel´s BLACK pack
description: A stylish Vanilla+ pack with dark visuals, black/white hotbar, and unique custom textures for tools, mobs, and much more.
body:
## Recommended: Use 1.21.5+ with Optifine or similar.
**Summary:**\
A detail focused texture pack featuring a sleek dark UI, reduced visual clutter (lower fire, shield, totem), custom enchantment icons, unique textures for name tags, tools, paintings and axolotls. Perfect for players who value clarity, visual polish, and a touch of PvP aesthetics.

### Hotbar
Black/White Hotbar with the style of BastiGHG´s "ZickZack v4 - 1.5 Mio Special" Pack
![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17ad5ed98d66a32fe9346b89f911d38c4c1a3d27.png)

---------------------------------------------------
‎ 
### Darker Netherite
Overall less saturated and darker netherite.\
Also changed color palette of netherite trim on netherite armor. 


![Darker Netherite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70021e3d5a47db7f6f6aff65111d3c5a5c2cd088.png)

---------------------------------------------------

### Silk Touch Tools
All Tools with Silk Touch show a Gray Rubby on them

![Silk Touch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/327c1151a2a25ea3ec2f5e1d78091960b438d656.png)

---------------------------------------------------

### Rare "Green" Axolotl and Bucket variants
Changed Rare Blue Axolotl to Green Texture.\
Added New Bucket Variations for Axolotl in Inventory.

![Rare "Green" Axolotl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a7d14774612340fe173915ee462294cd9bce092_0.webp)
![Axolotl Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f43b3f701b8590760e6d260771daf52b51abe46b.png)

---------------------------------------------------

## Full Feature List:




<details>
<summary>Feature List</summary>

davidpel pack:

- black/white hotbar, items selector, hearts/hardcore hearts, xp bar, armor bar
- custom Icons for enchantments in item infobox
- dark mode menus with light gray text
- lower fire in pov
- lower shield in pov
- lower totem + custom texture
- smaller totem pop
- less rain & snow texture 
- clearer water from land
- clearer Banner Patterns
- custom Texture for max Kelp age
- no pumpkin texture while wearing
- darker netherite Items & netherite armor on Player
- darker netherite armor for nautilus & horse
- darker Color Palette for netherite trim on netherite armor
- green Color for rare blue Axolotl from "davidpel utilities" Pack
- dark oak plank as menu Background
- "old" (pre 1.21.9) dye textures

Note Version/Mod:

- dark mode for the "Simple Voice Chat" Mod
- custom sky (some older version of Dramatic Sky´s) [OptiFine Sky Format]
- connected glass texture [CTM]
- custom gray accent for all silk touch tools [CIT / 1.21.5+]
- custom texture for each painting (Inv) [1.21.5+]
- custom texture for axolotl variations in a bucket incl. "green" one [1.21.5+]
- custom texture for Name tags and renamed one´s (Dinnerbone, etc.) [1.21.5+]

</details>
